task_completion.description: Verifies that the 'wazuh-alerts-*' index pattern is used for the visualizations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'wazuh-alerts-*' selected in the index pattern dropdown or displayed in the configuration panel during visualization creation.

task_completion.description: Verifies that a filter is applied for SSH authentication failures.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a filter pill (usually below the search bar) or a query in the search bar containing 'rule.groups' and either 'authentication_failed' or 'sshd'.

task_completion.description: Verifies the creation of the 'SSH Failures Over Time' vertical bar chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a vertical bar chart (histogram) with the title 'SSH Failures Over Time'. The x-axis should represent time and the y-axis should represent a count of records.

task_completion.description: Verifies the creation of the 'Top SSH Attacking IPs' pie chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a pie chart with the title 'Top SSH Attacking IPs'. The configuration panel or legend should indicate that it is aggregating by the 'data.srcip' field.

task_completion.description: Verifies both visualizations are added to a single dashboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a dashboard canvas displaying both the 'SSH Failures Over Time' bar chart and the 'Top SSH Attacking IPs' pie chart together.

task_completion.description: Verifies the dashboard is saved with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the title 'SSH Threat Monitoring' at the top left of the dashboard page or in the save dialog.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used the OpenSearch/Kibana web interface to create the dashboard.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interaction with the OpenSearch/Kibana UI in a web browser, rather than terminal windows executing curl commands or API scripts to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: Verifies the visualizations are genuinely rendered by the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard OpenSearch/Kibana UI elements like interactive tooltips, legends, axis labels, and configuration sidebars, ensuring the charts are not mocked up in a drawing tool.

integrity.description: Verifies titles and configurations were entered into the actual application fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the titles and field names inside the proper OpenSearch/Kibana configuration text boxes or header areas, rather than text pasted over the screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Dashboard Title: 'SSH Threat Monitoring'. Visualization 1: Vertical bar chart (histogram) titled 'SSH Failures Over Time'. Visualization 2: Pie chart titled 'Top SSH Attacking IPs' aggregating on the 'data.srcip' field. Filter: 'rule.groups' must include 'authentication_failed' or 'sshd'.
